'''vagono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mckinstryite|mckinstryite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mckinstryite|mckinstryite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vagono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vægeneth|vægeneth]] || [[word:vægenej|vægenej]] || [[word:vægenesh|vægenesh]] || [[word:vægene|vægene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vagogonoth|vagogonoth]] || [[word:vagogonoj|vagogonoj]] || [[word:vagogonosh|vagogonosh]] || [[word:vagogono|vagogono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vagonoth|vagonoth]] || [[word:vagonoj|vagonoj]] || [[word:vagonosh|vagonosh]] || [[word:vagono|vagono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vagofnoth|vagofnoth]] || [[word:vagofnoj|vagofnoj]] || [[word:vagofnosh|vagofnosh]] || [[word:vagofnof|vagofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vagonotho|vagonotho]] || [[word:vagonojo|vagonojo]] || [[word:vagonosho|vagonosho]] || [[word:vagonoko|vagonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vagonoth|vagonoth]] || [[word:vagonoj|vagonoj]] || [[word:vagonosh|vagonosh]] || [[word:vagono|vagono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vagonothol|vagonothol]] || [[word:vagonojol|vagonojol]] || [[word:vagonoshol|vagonoshol]] || [[word:vagonokol|vagonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vagonothotho|vagonothotho]] || [[word:vagonojojo|vagonojojo]] || [[word:vagonoshosho|vagonoshosho]] || [[word:vagonoko|vagonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vagonothon|vagonothon]] || [[word:vagonojon|vagonojon]] || [[word:vagonoshon|vagonoshon]] || [[word:vagonokon|vagonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vagonothoro|vagonothoro]] || [[word:vagonojoro|vagonojoro]] || [[word:vagonoshoro|vagonoshoro]] || [[word:vagonokoro|vagonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
